title: [Using activity-based protein profiling method to explore the antitumor targets of spiramycin derivatives].
publicationName: Se pu = Chinese journal of chromatography

snippet: Carrimycin is a macrolide antibiotic widely used in the pharmaceutical and clinical fields， with its primary composition consisting of three distinct derivatives of spiramycin. title: Immune Evasion in Ovarian Cancer Peritoneal Metastasis: Mechanisms and Biomarker-Guided Therapeutic Matching.
snippet: Ovarian cancer peritoneal metastasis remains a major cause of recurrence and death despite advances in cytoreductive surgery, platinum-based chemotherapy, PARP inhibition, and immune checkpoint blockade. The limited activity of immunotherapy in this setting reflects layered immune resistance shaped by impaired antigen visibility, redundant inhibitory recept...
